title: 3 Top Undervalued Stocks To Watch: October 2023
text: We are in what is historically considered the slow season of the investing world, but there are still opportunities for value-minded investors willing to turn over a rock or two. Here are three undervalued stocks to consider.

title: Here are the 12 stocks Jim Cramer is watching, including a dire consumer forecast
text: Here are some of the tickers on my radar for Thursday, Sept. 28, taken directly from my reporter's notebook.

title: Striking Hollywood actors vote to authorize new walkout against videogame makers
text: LOS ANGELES — Striking actors have voted to expand their walkout to include the lucrative videogame market, a step that could put new pressure on Hollywood studios to make a deal with the performers who provide voices and stunts for games.

title: Videogame stocks mostly hold steady as actors strike threatens to spread to game publishers
text: Videogame stocks performed slightly better than the broader market Tuesday after striking actors voted late Monday to expand their strike to work on videogames, which constitutes an even larger market than movies or television.

title: 1 Magnificent Growth Stock Down 35% to Buy Right Now and Hold for the Long Haul
text: Take-Two Interactive has a strong position in the video game industry. The company is poised for explosive growth over the next couple of years and beyond.

title: Is Take-Two Interactive Stock a Buy Now?
text: Share prices are up 36% in 2023 as Wall Street looks ahead to major releases over the next few years. Management's two-year financial guidance implies that a new "Grand Theft Auto" title could be imminent.

title: Take-Two Interactive to Host Webcast of 2023 Annual Meeting of Stockholders
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTWO) today announced that the Company will host a webcast of its 2023 Annual Meeting of Stockholders which is being held as a virtual, audio-only meeting hosted online at http://www.virtualshareholdermeeting.com/TTWO2023 on Thursday, September 21, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. title: The 3 Most Undervalued Gaming Stocks to Buy in September 2023
text: The ever-evolving video game industry continues to thrive and remains the fastest growing area of the entertainment industry. World Economic Forum claims that the video game industry is “booming” and cites a report forecasting that worldwide sales will reach $321 billion by 2026.

title: 3 Meme Stocks That Could Actually Rebound in Q4
text: It's the question everybody wants to know: Are meme stocks dead? Well, according to an August report from the Associated Press, apparently not.

title: Take-Two (TTWO) Up 1.1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Take-Two (TTWO) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: The 3 Best Gaming Stocks to Buy Now: September 2023
text: Pay close attention to the global video game market. For one, according to analysts at Newzoo, the global gaming market could generate up to $187.7 billion just this year.
